subject: fix(theme): sweep fixes from tap/cln/perf/sec/dbg/imp triggers
body:
tap: ThemeSelector dropdown items py-2.5 → py-3 for 44px+ touch targets.

cln: Removed unused --shadow-soft token and @utility card-lift from
index.css (defined but never referenced in any component).

perf: Removed unused activeTheme from App.jsx useDarkMode destructuring.

sec: Flash-prevention script in index.html now validates theme IDs
against hardcoded allowlists before setting data-theme attribute.
Prevents arbitrary attribute values from corrupted localStorage.

dbg: Added debugLog calls to useDarkMode.js — logs theme-applied,
light/dark-theme-set, invalid theme fallbacks (warn severity), and
cross-tab sync events. Theme changes now visible in DebugPill.

imp: Added React Context for theme values and split-hook refactoring
to docs/TODO.md as medium-priority items.

Tags: theme, a11y, security, cleanup, debug, mobile
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch
